spec.name: reading_failure_types
spec.notes: This file defines non-negotiable constraints that govern Owlume behavior. It is not learned, optimized, extended, or revised by runtime systems.

types.name: Mechanization
types.definition: Reducing narrative or symbolic text to a functional or explanatory mechanism before its meaning has been endured.

types.name: Position-Taking
types.definition: Occupying a stance of agreement, disagreement, or evaluation before reading has finished unfolding.

types.name: Premature Moralization
types.definition: Collapsing narrative tension into early judgments of good and bad, right and wrong.

types.name: Linguistic Drift Blindness
types.definition: Failing to notice that shifts in language are themselves actions that alter meaning, risk, or responsibility.

types.name: Responsibility Displacement
types.definition: Redirecting agency or consequence away from the reader or subject to preserve moral or emotional comfort.

types.name: Fairness Projection
types.definition: Imposing external standards of fairness or proportionality before the text has disclosed its own internal logic.

types.name: System Substitution
types.definition: Replacing personal position or responsibility with systems, structures, scale, or abstraction.

types.name: Promise Instrumentalization
types.definition: Using future resolution or assurance to neutralize present uncertainty or obligation.

types.name: Acceleration Substitution
types.definition: Attempting to bypass waiting, silence, or indeterminacy through premature action.

types.name: Spiritual or Moral Elitism
types.definition: Interpreting selection, success, or survival as evidence of superiority or moral rank.

types.name: Temporal Compression
types.definition: Eliminating duration, delay, or development by leaping directly from beginning to outcome.

types.name: Premature Consolation
types.definition: Deploying meaning, reassurance, or closure before loss, ambiguity, or harm has been fully faced.

types.name: Interpretive Substitution
types.definition: Replacing the act of reading with explanation, summary, or conceptual mastery.

types.name: Tension Relief Compulsion
types.definition: Treating unresolved tension as a defect rather than as a condition of meaning.
